name: Spicy Meatball Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Thinly sliced green onions with tops
28 oz Whole tomatoes including liquid, cut up (from a can)
15.5 oz Dark red kidney beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the ground beef, 1/2 cup corn, 1/3 cup salsa, egg, green onions with tops, half the cilantro, half the cumin, 1 teaspoon garlic, and salt. Shape into 36 balls.
2. Place half of the meatballs on paper towels in a rectangular baking dish.
3. Microwave on high for 5-7 minutes, or until no longer pink. Remove cooked meatballs and microwave remaining half of the meatballs as before; set aside.
4. In a 3-quart casserole, place bell pepper and remaining 1/2 teaspoon garlic. Cover with lid or vented plastic wrap and microwave on high for 2 minutes.
5. Add tomatoes including liquid, beans, remaining corn, broth. Stir in remaining two-thirds cup salsa, 1 tablespoon cilantro, 1 teaspoon cumin, and chili powder; re-cover.
6. Microwave stirring midway through cooking until mixture begins to boil. Add meatballs; re-cover and microwave on high for 4 minutes, or until meat is hot.
7. Makes 6 servings of 1 1/2 cups each.
